title: The Role of the Proposal Distribution in a Metropolis-Hastings Sampler
description: A flowchart illustrating how a proposal distribution is used to generate candidate samples in the Metropolis-Hastings MCMC algorithm, which are then accepted or rejected based on the target distribution.
relationships: α is calculated from π(θ*) and π(θ_t)
Decision rule accepts θ* as θ_t+1 or keeps θ_t
